name: Medallia Experience Management API
what_it_does: Medallia REST API for enterprise experience management platform covering customer experience (CX), employee experience (EX), and voice of customer (VoC). Enables AI agents to query survey responses, retrieve feedback signals, access NPS and CSAT trends, and integrate experience intelligence into CX and HR workflows. Medallia is the dominant enterprise EXM platform.
use_cases: Querying customer satisfaction scores and verbatim feedback from CX analytics agents
Retrieving NPS trends and detractor signals from retention intelligence agents
Accessing employee engagement survey data from HR analytics agents
Integrating Medallia experience data into CRM and operational workflow agents
not_for: Simple single-question NPS surveys (Delighted or Promoter.io are simpler)
Small teams without enterprise survey programs
best_when: A large enterprise using Medallia wants AI agents to surface CX and EX signals, analyze feedback trends, and integrate experience intelligence into operational and strategic workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Individual survey responses are sensitive personal data. Employee survey data falls under strict privacy protections. Medallia is enterprise-priced with complex licensing.

auth.notes: Medallia OAuth 2.0. Developer portal for app registration. Enterprise tenant-scoped access with roles.

pricing.notes: Enterprise experience management platform. Significant investment. API access included with subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per tenant and API type

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Individual survey response data is sensitive personal data under GDPR
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Medallia has strict data anonymization thresholds — low-response groups return no data
Employee survey data requires additional consent and privacy controls
Medallia's data model is complex — understand Units, Surveys, Responses hierarchy
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer and employee survey data including verbatim feedback. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. Anonymity thresholds protect individual respondents. AU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: PRIVACY: Survey response PII including verbatim. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. Anonymity thresholds. AU data residency.
